name: SubDVertexFacetType
summary: Summarizes the number of edges in faces in the whole object.

enum_values.name: Unset
enum_values.summary: Not a valid vertex face type.

enum_values.name: Ngon
enum_values.summary: Edge count of faces is constant and > 4.

enum_values.name: Mixed
enum_values.summary: Edge count of faces is not constant.
